Title: Limits the use of timeout boxes, closets or other secluded physical enclosures in schools in the state
Summary: Prohibits the use of timeout boxes, closets or other secluded physical enclosures for children in schools in the state except for authorized uses prescribed by the commissioner.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to limiting the use of timeout boxes, closets or other secluded physical enclosures in schools in the state
